Women's Jiu Jitsu Class

Women's BJJ | 2025

Back to News & Blog

Attention Ladies! We now have a women's only Jiu Jitsu Class.

Our very own Samantha Derti will be teaching class on Tuesdays and Thursdays from 5:30 PM – 6:30 PM (floor B).

Ready to Train With Us?

Your first class is completely free — no experience needed.

Camal & Cruz Judo & Jiu Jitsu

Camal & Cruz Judo & Jiu Jitsu is Totowa's premier martial arts academy. We develop champions on and off the mats through world-class instruction and a supportive community.

Programs

  • Kids Jiu Jitsu & Judo
  • Kids Self Defense
  • Adult Brazilian Jiu Jitsu
  • Adult Judo
  • CRAWL: Toddler Martial Arts
